description: Strategy detection with QueryClientProvider wrapper and afterEach with queryClient.clear(). Tests: (1) integration-providers strategy detection, (2) cleanup classification when afterEach uses queryClient.clear() instead of restoreAllMocks -- interpreter misses this as valid cleanup.

expectedClassifications.notes: mocking own hook -- same domain directory

afterEach calls queryClient.clear() -- legitimate cleanup. Interpreter emits CLEANUP_INCOMPLETE because it only recognizes mock restoration patterns, not query cache cleanup. This is a known interpreter gap.
